emails.subject: Midway
emails.body: How's Glenn doing with my binder? Lots of Midway activity this week. Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: Midway
emails.body: Midway I'm desperate. HELP!!!!!! We have a meeting with Duran et al today, and I really wanted to brouse through this before then.
